steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize a similarity between the two TV programs. The notes say the slow TV genre consists of programs that document ordinary events in real time — that is the shared feature both programs must express.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'A prime example of the slow TV genre can be seen in All Aboard! The Sleigh Ride...': mentions only one program. No comparison to Monsen is made. ✗
  • Choice B — 'While All Aboard! The Sleigh Ride depicts a sleigh ride...Monsen depicts a hike...': mentions both programs but emphasizes their different subjects, not a similarity. ✗
  • Choice C — 'Compared to the 5-hour-long Monsen, All Aboard! is relatively short, at 2 hours.': mentions both programs but emphasizes the difference in running time. ✗
  • Choice D — 'Documenting ordinary events in real time, All Aboard! and Monsen are both documentary programs in the slow TV genre.': explicitly states the shared characteristic — both document ordinary events in real time and both belong to the slow TV genre. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
